Configuration:
  codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack: (same)
    [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::test::codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack::test-dev]
    ~ codeinfra-python:dynamic:Resource: (update)
        [id=quux2]
        [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::test::codeinfra-python:dynamic:Resource::test-x]
    --codeinfra-python:dynamic:Resource: (delete-replaced)
        [id=foo]
        [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::test::codeinfra-python:dynamic:Resource::test-r]
